creator: devin.teske@fisglobal.com
text:
jh@ tested and found that the later-call to f_double in menu.4th is overriding the previously-set ASCII charset.

The newly attached patch changes to applying the ASCII charset if serial mode is detected each time f_single or f_double is called. In addition, things are cleaned up a bit.
-- 
Devin
